_comment: Bus-stop (정류장) scene — camera aimed at the platform. Shape stop_polygon around the passenger-waiting area (for density). bus_zone_polygon outlines where buses physically park (gates boarding/alighting counts so passers-by don't inflate numbers). doors[].line: each door's horizontal crossing line at the bus sill. Enable output_video to get an annotated MP4 with head circles + boarding/alighting flashes. Capacity ≈ platform area / 0.3 m² per standing passenger.
